svg.title: Inception-of-Things full architecture: Part 1, Part 2, Part 3
svg.desc: Three-part architecture diagram showing K3s+Vagrant cluster, Ingress routing, and K3d+ArgoCD GitOps pipeline

g.text: Two VMs provisioned by a single Vagrantfile

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What runs on the K3s server node in Part 1?')
sendPrompt('What runs on the K3s agent node in Part 1?')

g.text: One VM · K3s server · three apps at 192.168.56.110

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Ingress route requests in Part 2?')
sendPrompt('Explain how the K3s Ingress resource works')
sendPrompt('Why does App 2 have 3 replicas in Part 2?')
sendPrompt('How is the default app3 selected?')

g.text: Docker + K3d · two namespaces · automated continuous deployment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in the public GitHub repo for Part 3?')
sendPrompt('What Docker image is used in Part 3?')
sendPrompt('How does Argo CD sync from GitHub?')
sendPrompt('What pod runs in the dev namespace?')
sendPrompt('What should the Part 3 install script include?')
sendPrompt('How do you expose Argo CD UI and the app locally?')
sendPrompt('How do you verify the app version with curl?')

svg.text: sed image tag → git push → ArgoCD detects → pod rolling update → curl confirms v2

g.text: Self-hosted GitLab replaces GitHub · ns: gitlab · Helm recommended
